'''Entuur''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] inhabited by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] race known as the [[Entuuran]]s.

==History==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] once visited this [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and attempted a [[military scrip]] exchange scam on the inhabitants,<ref name="TLL">''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''</ref><ref name="Unstated Canon">{{Blog|danwallace|153|Unstated Canon in Star Wars: The Essential Atlas}}</ref> which failed miserably.<ref name="GSWU2">''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref>
